decisions.rationale: Observation base_record_id route_s78-hylan-2010 already matches the existing registry record route_s78-hylan-2010. The observation resolves to its own canonical record; no link to a different record is needed. The S78 local route on Hylan Boulevard is distinct from any later SBS variant.

evidence_refs.source_quote: 16,000 trips/day on S78 and S79 local buses

decisions.rationale: Observation base_record_id route_s79-hylan-2010 already matches the existing registry record route_s79-hylan-2010. The S79 local route (2010) is a distinct service variant from the later S79+ SBS (route_able-s79-sbs); per do_not_merge_pairs precedent, local and SBS variants are not canonical identity merges.

evidence_refs.source_quote: 16,000 trips/day on S78 and S79 local buses

decisions.rationale: Observation base_record_id route_bx12-plus already matches the existing registry record route_bx12-plus. The registry record lists route_bx12-sbs-hylan-example as an alias and includes this source among its source_ids. The observation refers to the same Bx12 Select Bus Service on Fordham Road/Pelham Parkway used as an SBS example in the Hylan Boulevard presentation.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Experience on Fordham Road and Pelham Parkway (Bx12) – 20% travel time savings – 30% increase in ridership
